name: Jiace Zhu
affiliation: Shanghai Jiao Tong University Global College
bio: Jiace Zhu is a Ph.D. student at Shanghai Jiao Tong University Global College, working with Prof. An Zou. His public research record focuses on efficient large language model inference, GPU-oriented benchmarking, and real-time computing on heterogeneous architectures.

education.degree: Ph.D. in Electronic Science and Technology
education.school: Shanghai Jiao Tong University Global College
College of Electronics and Information Engineering

honors.title: Third Place, Embedded System Software Design Contest
honors.description: Team project: RTHeter, with Yinchen Ni, Jiace Zhu, and Xingzhe Cai.
